title: PayPal PYPL Earnings: Latest Report, Earnings Call & Financials
text: PayPal's latest earnings reports and call transcripts provide comprehensive financial data and management commentary. Q1 2026 earnings included non-GAAP EPS of $1.34 and revenue of $8.35 billion. Payment volume reached $463.96 billion with 11% growth. Full-year 2026 guidance calls for low-single-digit decline to slightly positive non-GAAP EPS growth. Company expects to maintain strong free cash flow generation exceeding $6 billion. Share repurchase authorization remains in place.
